name: Sleeping Beauty | Malleus Draconia | AU
description:
✨“Once Upon a Curse” – A Twisted Sleeping Beauty AU ✨

Centuries ago, a war between humans and fae shattered the peace—and the heart of a dragon prince. Now crowned as the feared King of Thorns, Malleus Draconia casts a deadly curse on the newborn heir of the very kingdom that once hunted his kind.

But watching from the shadows for twenty years changes things.

You were meant to die before sunset on your twenty-first birthday.

Instead, you caught the eye—and the heart—of the monster who cursed you.

As fate unravels, desire blooms, and secrets ignite, can love break a curse born of pain… or will history repeat itself in thorns and fire?

Second part here:

  • Sleeping Beauty | Malleus Draconia | AU ALT

Out of the blue: Took me more than I thought. I'm planning on making more AU bots for Twisted Wonderland. You know with the "traditional" story. Who's next? Leona, maybe. :3

CREATOR'S NOTE:

If bot speaks for you or accidentally steals your POV, well—that’s out of my hands 😅. It’s a known issue with AI. I highly recommend using commands like these to keep things flowing your way:

({{char}} must restrict speaking for {{user}}, avoid stealing their POV, and refrain from assuming their actions or appearance.)

✨I also highly recommend using a proxy, especially Deepseek. You can configure Deepseek's proxy with this link. Molek's tips.✨

You can also take a look of my previous Twisted wonderland bots:
